message:
Refactor test fixtures for cleaner API and fix unique constraint issues

Test Fixtures Overhaul (internal/testutil/fixtures.go):
The previous fixture implementation had verbose option functions and didn't
generate unique identifiers, causing unique constraint failures when tests
created multiple sessions/requests with the same agent name or project path.

Changes:
- MakeSession now generates unique IDs automatically:
  * ID: "sess-" + randHex(6)
  * AgentName: "Agent-" + randHex(4)
  * ProjectPath: filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "project") for true isolation
- MakeRequest generates unique request ID: "req-" + randHex(6)

- Simplify option function API:
  * WithProject(path) - set project path
  * WithAgent(agent) - set agent name
  * WithProgram(p) - set program
  * WithModel(m) - set model
  * WithCommand(raw, cwd, shell) - set command spec
  * WithRisk(tier) - set risk tier
  * WithExpiresAt(t) - set expiry

- Keep backward-compatible aliases:
  * SessionWithAgentName(agent) -> WithAgent(agent)
  * SessionWithProject(path) -> WithProject(path)

- Remove MakeReview helper (unused) and overly specific option functions that
  were rarely used (RequestWithRequireDifferentModel, ReviewWithComments, etc.)

- Add randHex(n) helper that generates pseudo-random hex strings for test IDs
  using time.Now().UnixNano() for simple but sufficient uniqueness.

Request Test Fix (internal/core/request_test.go):
- Update TestDynamicQuorum_BelowFloor to use consistent project path between
  session creation and quorum check. Previously the test created a session
  with default project path but queried with "/test/project", causing the
  dynamic quorum lookup to find 0 sessions instead of 1.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
